name: Rutabaga Puree
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and dice rutabaga and sweet potato; place in a saucepan.
2. Cover with water and bring to a boil.
3. Reduce heat and simmer until tender.
4. Drain the vegetables, reserving some of the liquid.
5. Place the vegetables in a blender or food processor fitted with the metal blade.
6. Process to a puree.
7. Add cayenne pepper, nutmeg, and non-fat dry milk powder; process to blend.
8. Reheat if necessary, using some of the reserved water.
9. Garnish with fresh parsley and serve.
Food Exchange per serving: 1 VEGETABLE EXCHANGE + 1/2 STARCH/BREAD EXCHANGE
Calories: 55
Carbohydrates: 16g
Protein: 2g
Sodium: 32mg
Fat: 0g
